content:
很抱歉，本次轮换唤醒活动设计考虑不周。我们会在版本更新时将V2.4唤醒体与命轮组合唤醒的形式更换为唤醒体与命轮独立唤醒的形式，敬请注意。


我们将在近期发布更多V2.4.0内容，我代表脑缸组感谢大家的支持和谅解。

We’re sorry—the design of this rotation awakening event was not well thought out. In the upcoming version update, we will change the V2.4 awakening format from “Awakener+ WoD Select Group” to “Awakener and WoD independently.” Please take note.

We will share more V2.4.0 details soon. On behalf of the B.I.A.V.Studio team, thank you for your support and understanding.
thread_title: 致歉：V2.4.0 轮换唤醒「群星闪耀时」调整 Apology: V2.4.0 Rotation Awakening “Galactic Light” Adjustment
